name: Dropdown
description: Select-only combobox for choosing one or more options from a list.

open.description: Controlled open state for the option list.

defaultOpen.description: Initial open state for uncontrolled usage.

onOpenChange.description: Callback fired when open state changes.

defaultSelected.description: Initial selected options for uncontrolled usage.

multiselect.description: Allows selecting more than one option.

value.description: Controlled text shown in the trigger button.

valueToString.description: Maps option values to display text; required when value is not a simple display string.

placeholder.description: Text displayed when there is no value.

readOnly.description: Prevents changing selection while still allowing focus.

required.description: Marks the dropdown as required for form semantics.

variant.description: Visual emphasis variant for the trigger.

bordered.description: Adds a full border around the trigger.

validationStatus.description: Applies validation styling and status adornment.

startAdornment.description: Renders leading visual content in the trigger.

emptyReadOnlyMarker.description: Marker shown for empty read-only dropdowns.

OverlayProps.description: Props passed to the list overlay container.

slots.children: Use `Option` and optional `OptionGroup` children to define the option list.

keyboard: Tab / Shift+Tab — moves focus in tab order; when leaving dropdown, current active option is selected
Space / Enter — selects active option (single-select closes list; multiselect keeps list open)
Escape — closes list and keeps focus on dropdown
ArrowDown / ArrowUp — opens list when closed; navigates options when open
Home / End — moves active option to first/last
PageUp / PageDown — moves active option by visible page
Printable characters — typeahead matching across options
aria: Trigger uses `role=combobox` with `aria-expanded`, `aria-controls`, and active descendant semantics
Set accessible label via FormField label or `aria-labelledby`/`aria-label`
Use OptionGroup labels for grouped options

inside: Form layouts requiring single or multi selection from a bounded list
Toolbars and settings panels where selected value remains visible
